name: Lamphere Rectangle Aluminum Modern Dining Bench Dark Gray - Christopher Knight Home: Weather-Resistant, Patio Seating
description: Give your outdoor dining set a convenient companion that will give your guests ample seating space. Made from aluminum, this Christopher Knight Home Lamphere Rectangle Aluminum Modern Dining Bench offers reassuring durability and a polished look to your home, making this the perfect accent piece to your dining set. The legs are finished with a beautiful X-shape, bringing a rustic influence to this modern design that gives any backyard or patio space a sleek upgrade. Finished with a gorgeous slat design, this Christopher Knight Home Lamphere Rectangle Aluminum Modern Dining Bench allows you to effortlessly enjoy endless summer days.
